raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom It May Concern : I was asked to provide a letter outlining the details for this case. On XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, the following fraudulent charges were made in XXXX, CA : Date Vendor Charge XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX {$9.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX # XXXX {$65.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX - XXXX XXXX/XXXX XXXX {$20.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX # XXXX {$47.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX # XXXX {$100.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX # XXXX {$77.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX  # XXXX {$13.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX # XXXX XXXX XXXX {$110.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX  # XXXX XXXX {$220.00} Total : {$670.00} At that time and currently, I live in Bend, Oregon and have the physical credit card in my possession. These charges were made in XXXX, California. On XX/XX/XXXX around XXXX PDT, I received a fraud alert. I called and reported that these charges were indeed fraudulent and not made by me or anyone one who was an authorized user ( who also lives in XXXX, Oregon ). 

I was attending a workout class on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX studio ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, OR XXXX ). You can call ( XXXX ) XXXX to verify my attendance. Attached is a PDF of my class attendance for XX/XX/XXXX where I was in a workout class in XXXX, Oregon at the time of the charges. 

Please remove these charges since they were not made by me nor did I authorize anyone. I have the physical card in my possession. I have lived in Oregon since XX/XX/XXXX and have not been to XXXX, California since then.
